comment.body:
have you read the post? i wrote, '24s april low potential
but it is pointless to guess, bcs this regime is full of 0DTE manipulation that you can't see forward, bcs those are new positions during the day.
very high intraday activity, increased negative gamma, sticky high vol, fat left-tail, very sensitive environment.
this is why i keep saying, in this regime you go day by day. 
i traded along these regimes many times. ;))

comment.body:
by the way, i see this mistake many times...
guys, the market just opened. you haven't seen anything yet. it is highly volatile, you got no positioning, no momentum, no pattern for this week. 
why would you like to chase any trades only bcs it is opened? :))
in these regimes, one better just watch first before acting. 
Be patient, 
trade only when you got a read on the tape, and got a plan on that read.
don't trade without concept, or they OWN you.
this is the most common and worse mistake traders keep commiting.
don't follow them. wait for the market to give it to you. okay?

Read my post, digest it, do your research on that, and listen patiently.
and the market will come to you when it doesn't know, and then you jump on it like a lion on its prey, and run away with the money

:))

comment.body:
here is the definition of beta. https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/p/the-concept-of-risk-var-beta-sharpe

a bit like correlation, but beta tells you the MAGNITUDE of change in one variable relative to the other, not simply correlation. vol adjusted correlation if you like it so
